criteriaResults.criterion: Input field receives focus on page load
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test passes, init() calls todoInput.focus()

criteriaResults.criterion: Add todo via button click
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test passes, uses unshift() to add at top

criteriaResults.criterion: Add todo via Enter key
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test passes, form submit handles Enter

criteriaResults.criterion: Empty input is blocked
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test passes, input has required attribute

criteriaResults.criterion: Input field clears after successful add
criteriaResults.evidence: Code sets value to empty string after add

criteriaResults.criterion: Each todo displays text entered by user
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E tests verify visible text matches input

criteriaResults.criterion: Each todo has clickable checkbox on left side
criteriaResults.evidence: Checkbox rendered with flex-shrink, E2E tests pass

criteriaResults.criterion: Checkbox toggles completion status
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test 'toggles todo completion' passes

criteriaResults.criterion: Completed todos show strikethrough text
criteriaResults.evidence: CSS has text-decoration: line-through for completed class

criteriaResults.criterion: Completed todos use muted/gray color scheme
criteriaResults.evidence: CSS uses --color-completed (#9ca3af)

criteriaResults.criterion: Checkbox shows checked state when completed
criteriaResults.evidence: Render function adds checked attribute based on state

criteriaResults.criterion: Each todo has delete button on right side
criteriaResults.evidence: Delete button rendered with class 'delete', positioned right

criteriaResults.criterion: Clicking delete removes todo immediately
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test passes, no confirmation dialog

criteriaResults.criterion: Remaining todos reposition after deletion
criteriaResults.evidence: render() re-renders entire list after delete

criteriaResults.criterion: Empty state reappears when last todo deleted
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test verifies empty state visible after delete

criteriaResults.criterion: Tab key cycles through interactive elements
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test 'keyboard navigation works' passes

criteriaResults.criterion: Spacebar toggles checkbox when focused
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test uses Space key to toggle

criteriaResults.criterion: All interactive elements have visible focus indicators
criteriaResults.evidence: CSS has :focus-visible styles for all elements

criteriaResults.criterion: ARIA states updated for completed todos
criteriaResults.evidence: E2E test 'ARIA checked state updates' passes

criteriaResults.criterion: E2E test file created
criteriaResults.evidence: tests/e2e/todo.spec.js exists with 256 lines

criteriaResults.criterion: E2E tests cover add, complete, un-complete, delete
criteriaResults.evidence: All flows covered by dedicated tests

criteriaResults.criterion: All E2E tests pass
criteriaResults.evidence: 75 tests pass across 5 browsers

handoff.handoffNotes: All acceptance criteria verified and passing. Full CRUD operations implemented with keyboard accessibility. All 75 E2E tests pass across Chromium, Firefox, WebKit, Mobile Chrome, and Mobile Safari.
